raw_consumer_statement:
I made a purchase XXXX for amount of {$190.00}. The item was not as described and was shipped back to merchant as requested. I sent in documents for my dispute on XXXX to citi and also XXXX more times after that. 
They stated they made a mistake and did not see my documents sent in so the time frame for the dispute past and I lost my money and no item. It is not my fault citi did not take care of this matter as I did my part on time and before documents were asked for.
